title: galium gracile var. miltorrhizum
intro: Galium gracile var. miltorrhizum, also known as Galium gracile, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as wound healing, immune system support, and protection against oxidative stress. Galium gracile var. miltorrhizum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal remedy.
